## Security Issue Type
- [ ] Vulnerability Discovery
- [ ] Active Incident
- [ ] Data Breach
- [ ] Authentication/Authorization Issue
- [ ] Data Protection Issue

## Severity Level
- [ ] Critical (Immediate threat to data/system)
- [ ] High (Significant vulnerability)
- [ ] Medium (Moderate risk)
- [ ] Low (Minor issue)

## Description
<!-- Describe the security issue -->
<!-- DO NOT include sensitive data, credentials, or user information -->

<!-- Which part of the system is affected -->

- **Data at Risk**:

<!-- Only if it's a vulnerability being disclosed -->

## Immediate Mitigation
<!-- What actions have been taken or should be taken immediately? -->

<!-- How should this be fixed? -->
